Watcher.description: Flying drone equipped with arc weaponry and the ability to call for reinforcements.
Watcher.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Overseer.description: Elite unit equipped with an energy shield and a deadly lance capable of launching an explosive projectile, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
Overseer.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Elevated Overseer.description: Elite unit equipped with automatic plasma rifles and jet-packs, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
Elevated Overseer.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Crescent Overseer.description: Elite unit equipped with a large plasma cannon, capable of direct & mortar fire, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
Crescent Overseer.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Fleshmob.description: An amalgamation of Voteless corpses, this large Illuminate unit specializes in close quarters combat and charges at Helldivers to attack.
Fleshmob.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Harvester.description: Massive autonomous tripod with an energy shield and a large laser weapon. Can also use arc weaponry in close-quarters.

fire.label: Fire*
fire.special: Only if th eye hitbox is broken.

notes: * The shield is immune to all statuses. ** Recharge delay : 12 | Broken recharge delay : 12 | Recharge rate : 2000.
Harvester.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Stingray.description: Flying Illuminate unit that deploys strafing runs against Helldivers, dealing massive damage over a large area.
Stingray.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Warp Ship.description: Transport aircraft used for deploying reinforcements for the Illuminate.
notes: * The shield is immune to all statuses. ** Recharge delay : 1 | Broken recharge delay : 15 | Recharge rate : 200.
Warp Ship.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Leviathan.description: Tank-armored flying Illuminate unit, armed with large plasma cannons and bomb droppers.
Leviathan.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Overship.description: Unarmed host ships, these units act as command centers for Illuminate ground forces.
notes: * Recharge delay : 20 | Broken recharge delay : 60 | Recharge rate : 500
Overship.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Cognitive Disruptor.description: An ancient structure that obscures the names and randomizes the inputs of all Stratagems for Helldivers within 200 meters.
Cognitive Disruptor.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Lightning Spire.description: Static tesla type defenses often found at Illuminate Encampments and Illuminate exclusive Objectives.
Lightning Spire.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv

Monolith.description: Strange Illuminate monoliths seem to be creating fields of negative energy. We do not understand their purpose or their true nature. That is why they must be destroyed.
Monolith.source_csv: ONGOING UPDATE - Helldivers II Enemies Index [UNOFFICIAL] - Illuminate (old).csv
